name: Pumpkin (or Squash) Spice Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Pumpkin, sieved and cooked (or winter squash)
1/2 cup Buttermilk or sour milk (or stir 1 1/2 tsp vinegar into 1/2 cup sweet milk and allow to stand 10 minutes)
1/2 cup Nuts, chopped and toasted (walnuts, pecans, filberts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter well in a mixing bowl.
2. Add the sugar and cream until fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs and pumpkin.
4. Sift together the dry ingredients and stir in alternately with the milk.
5. If using an electric mixer, add the dry ingredients and milk on lowest speed; mix just until smooth.
6. Fold in the nuts.
7. Turn batter into a greased and floured sheet cake pan (11x14x2 inches) or two 8-inch layer cake pans.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes (sheet cake) or 25 minutes (layers).
9. Cool on a rack for 5 minutes, then loosen from the pan and turn out to cool.
10. Frost with Caramel Frosting.
Frosting Instructions:
1. In a saucepan over low heat, combine sugar and cream.
2. Cook until boiling, then cover and cook 3 minutes.
3. Remove cover and continue cooking until mixture reaches 236-240°F.
4. Stir in butter, salt, and vanilla.
5. Cool to lukewarm, then beat until creamy smooth and spreading consistency.
